required_preferences.fact: Temporarily replaces morning group walks with at-home gentle stretching and light physical activity — does not engage in outdoor walks or treadmill exercise during heart monitoring period

supersedes.fact: Begins every morning with a two-mile group walk, rain or shine — never substitutes with solo treadmill walks

required_preferences.fact: Participates in online crossword puzzle competitions with her book club — avoids solo online play, preferring virtual group events

supersedes.fact: Participates in crossword puzzle competitions at the community center — never does online puzzles

required_preferences.fact: Avoids large family gatherings; prefers small, intimate get-togethers with just immediate family
Regularly attends social events and support groups at the assisted living facility to help her brother acclimate and meet new people
Coordinates regular evening video calls with her brother as a substitute for in-person visits while fulfilling full-time childcare responsibilities
Schedules medication reminders on her phone — never relies on memory alone

persona: A retired finance professor who volunteers as a tax advisor
